---
title: "Meeting_01_08_2025"
author: "Matthew"
date: "2025-07-31"
output: github_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Key points

- Constructed wealth index
    - Using the parent id variables, I matched the monetary asset values of the parents to their children from our target group.
- Got OLS estimates for a model with log income (model 1) and employment status (model 2) both from wave 4 as depedent variables.
